title: Senior Financial Analyst - Shriram Finance Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Shriram Finance Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Shriram Finance Holdings Services in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Shriram Finance Holdings Services:
Shriram Finance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
